text: Standing just outside the glass wall, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The room beyond glows with the warm promise of discovery, yet the barrier between myself and the exhibits introduces a moment of pause—a reflective threshold. The subtle hum of fluorescent lights and the lone figure passing by remind me of my own presence, anonymous and observant, about to cross into a curated world of thought and experimentation. There is a quiet excitement in being on the edge of knowledge, waiting to step inside and engage.
